known_issues: No native LinkedIn enrichment — reps manually copy contact data
Email sequence builder limited to 5 steps; competitors offer unlimited
API rate limits cause sync delays with InsightDeck (analytics tool)
Mobile app is unstable — crashes reported on iOS 17+
Reporting dashboards not customisable without paying for add-on
positive_signals: Reliable uptime — no major incidents in 18 months
Custom pipeline stages work well for consulting sales cycle

known_issues: Performance review module is outdated — no continuous feedback, only annual cycles
No built-in eNPS or pulse survey tooling
Onboarding workflows require manual setup per new hire — no templates
UK payroll integration with PayAxis requires a middleware connector that breaks quarterly
GDPR right-to-erasure requests must be handled manually via support ticket
positive_signals: Leave management and absence tracking works flawlessly
Employee self-service portal well adopted (82% monthly active)
HRIS data reliable — single source of truth for headcount

known_issues: No native multi-currency — EUR invoices require manual conversion and journal entries
Reconciliation on datasets >5,000 rows takes 8–12 minutes; causes month-end bottleneck
Revenue recognition module not IFRS 15 compliant — workaround in use
No real-time bank feed for Barclays Business accounts (only overnight sync)
Audit trail export is CSV only — external auditors have requested PDF with digital signature
positive_signals: VAT return filing via MTD is fully automated
Chart of accounts well configured for professional services billing

known_issues: No time-tracking built in — staff use a separate tool (ChronoLog) at £95/mo
Client portal view is read-only; clients cannot comment or approve deliverables in-app
Gantt chart view requires manual refresh — does not auto-update on dependency changes
No resource capacity planning — managers track utilisation in spreadsheets
Slack integration was deprecated in TaskBridge v4.1; now requires Zapier workaround
positive_signals: Template library well-stocked for consulting project types
Board view intuitive — high adoption across non-technical staff

known_issues: NexusCRM sync hits API rate limits above 50k records — dashboards stale by up to 4 hours
No self-serve embedded reporting for clients — requires export and manual PDF
ML-based anomaly detection promised on roadmap since Q2 2023, still not shipped
No mobile view — dashboards non-functional on phones/tablets
Data lineage tracking absent — compliance team flagging this for upcoming ISO audit
positive_signals: Drag-and-drop dashboard builder is fast and flexible
Data connector library covers all current stack tools
White-labelling available on current plan — used for 3 client dashboards
